12 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
prevalent in different nations followed by different people with
regard to exorcism.
Here it is important to observe that the whole world HAS
A CHEMISTRY OF ITS OWN WHICH HAS DIRECT
SCIENTIFIC ASPECT. An Astrologer is nothing but a Scientist
helping the people in solving many of their problems.
Transmission of heat and light from higher density plane to
lower density plane, without heating the medium through which it
passes is known as RADIATION. This "RADIATION" is the
governing concept of the universe.
SHABDHA BRAHMA-THE SCIENCE OF SOUND
Soul has the power either to invite or disperse. In the same
manner pious words can radiate affection and bad words can
cause dispersion of people. IN THE WORDS OF GREAT LORD
BASAV ESWARA
"AY YA END ARE SWA RGA
ELAVO ENDARE NARAKA".
It means-when sound is properly used with respect in plural
